facts.claim: Oslo is the capital and most populous city of Norway.

Oslo[12][13][14] is the capital and most populous city of Norway. It constitutes both a county and a municipality. The municipality of Oslo had a population of 724,290 in 2025, while the city's greater urban area had a population of 1,110,887 in 2025,[15] and the metropolitan area had an estimated population of 1,546,706 in 2021.[16]
